codeReview.summary: The implementation is in scope and satisfies the feature’s expected behavior: registration/login now have client-side field validation and loading states, server/auth errors are surfaced correctly (including Zod arrays), auth pages redirect authenticated users to "/", unauthenticated users are redirected to "/login", and token 401 handling now preserves login/register error UX while still clearing stale auth for protected endpoint failures. The added tests meaningfully expand coverage for API auth cases and client auth flows, and the first-visit flow blocker (creating an organization from the UI) was addressed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared architecture doc’s Sidebar description is now stale after this feature; it omits the newly added "New Organization" action used in first-visit onboarding.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:86 describes Sidebar controls as org/scenario selectors plus new/clone scenario and budget; packages/client/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx:42-86 now includes handleNewOrg and a "New Organization" button.

summary: Reviewed improve-auth-flows (commit bf7aecd). Feature implementation is correct and complete for the requested auth flow improvements and first-visit onboarding behavior, so status is pass. One shared-state observation was noted: architecture documentation is now out of date regarding Sidebar controls.
